calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Continued To Dec-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-10-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-22-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Carl Wescott, self-represented plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Aug-13-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. At the request of plaintiff in pro per, all previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
